stemHtml: Considering the CL vs. alpha graph for two identical asymmetrical aerofoil sections, one with zero sweep angle and one with a positive sweep angle, what is true about the point where they cross the CL axis?

options.a: The wing with the larger sweep angle crosses the axis above the wing with no sweep.
options.b: The wing with no sweep angle crosses the axis above the swept wing.
options.c: Both wings cross the CL axis at the same point.
options.d: Neither of the wings cross the CL axis.
